arts.ttl: Imagine the Nike Total 90 PSG 25 26 Third Kit
arts.sum: Based on leaked colors and information that Nike will be bringing back the T90 design on the 25-26 third kit, shirt designer COLEIRA (@coleirafc) imagined the PSG 25-26 third kit to see how it would look.

arts.ttl: PSG out to continue ‘winning’ run in European competition
arts.sum: Games between Bayern and PSG always attract the eyes of the world and rarely disappoint. Bayern have won the last three meetings between the two but boss Vincent Kompany is not underestimating the Ligue 1 side ahead of Tuesday’s game.

arts.ttl: PSG’s Fabián Ruiz knows shutting down Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane, Jamal Musiala could hold key to victory
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will take on Paris Saint-Germain later today in a game that many fans are anticipating. Awesome, then check out the Bavarian Podcast Works — Bundesliga Rundown with Marcus Iredahl on Patreon, Spotify, or below:

arts.ttl: Who is István Kovács, referee for Bayern Munich vs PSG in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Romanian referee István Kovács has been appointed to take charge of Bayern Munch’s home game against Paris Saint-Germain in the league phase of the 2024/25 Champions League on Tuesday. The Romanian was appointed for the 2022 World Cup but did not referee any games at the tournament, acting as fourth official in eight matches.

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: It’s time for Bayern Munich to get a signature win; Champions League predictions; Mathys Tel could be just what VfB Stuttgart needs in January; Throwing it back to Soul Asylum; and MORE!
arts.sum: In the Bundesliga so far, Bayern Munich has faced two serious contenders for the league title — Bayer Leverkusen and Eintracht Frankfurt. According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Dennis Bayer (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich attacker Mathys Tel is an intriguing option on loan in January for VfB Stuttgart — but nothing is close to happening yet:

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs PSG – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host PSG in the Uefa Champions League this Tuesday with both sides in need of a win to boost their chances of qualifying for the knockout rounds. The Bavarian outfit sit on six points following two victories and two defeats, while the Parisians have just four points from the opening four games, scoring […] The post Bayern Munich vs PSG – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'earmark Serie A star' as Alphonso Davies alternative
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing up a January swoop for AC Milan defender Theo Hernandez as an alternative to Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs PSG Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: There’s a blockbuster clash in Munich tonight as Bayern host French powerhouse PSG in the Champions League. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predi...

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich delighted with Bayern Munich’s style of play
arts.sum: “The way we’re playing football feels very, very good,” Kimmich said (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ). Of course, we conceded three goals against Frankfurt and four against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: PSG star Vitinha says squad is motivated to face Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Vitinha does not think his team will lack focus heading into its Champions League match with Bayern Munich. “It’s a big motivation to play a game in the Champions League, especially against Bayern, a big team in Europe.
